data.name: Hentai Nitro
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a relaxing journey with Hentai Nitro, where calming levels await as you progress, soothing your mind with each solved puzzle.

Hentai Nitro offers a cozy puzzle experience where you simply swap bricks to piece together beautiful images. As you progress, each stage becomes a gentle blend of challenge and comfort, encouraging you to unwind while steadily improving your focus and observation skills.

Feel stuck? No worries, hints are there to help! Each hint guides you toward the right move without breaking immersion, letting you enjoy the flow of the puzzle at your own pace while keeping frustration far away.

data.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Nitro, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
